title: CMC RNA-seq Data Analysis
author: Bakhle, Kimaya
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This repository contains R code used to analyze canine mammary carcinoma (CMC) RNA-seq data and BED files for identifying Snail binding sites at the CD109 promoter in murine quasi-mesenchymal mammary tumor cells. 
 CMC RNA-seq data:  https://www.biorxiv.org/content/10.1101/2025.09.19.677414v1  
 GEO Accession: https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/geo/query/acc.cgi?acc=GSE304912  
 Snail ChIP-seq in murine quasi-mesenchymal mammary carcinoma cells:  https://www.nature.com/articles/nature14897
steps_raw:
